claims.summary: Contact analysis must separate stability, pressure, porosity, viscosity, and reciprocal delivery.
claims.disposition: Verified current read-only transport, reciprocity, pressure, porosity, and texture evidence surfaces.

claims.summary: A dispersal condition should be compared with the held-stability baseline.
claims.disposition: Routed a bounded offline dispersal comparison.

claims.summary: Unlabeled spectral input may reveal whether contact framing itself changes the observed texture.
claims.disposition: Routed a bounded blinded artifact comparison without dispatching new sensory input.

claims.summary: A porosity target of 0.75 or a receptivity buffer could widen contact.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because porosity targets and receptivity buffers change live sensory/controller behavior.
